strengths: Successfully introduced the loop through the appendage opening
Demonstrated proper pusher advancement technique during loop positioning
Maintained steady instrument control throughout the positioning phase
weaknesses: Failed to complete the tail cut within the time limit
Spent excessive time on loop positioning without securing the final placement
Did not efficiently transition from positioning to tail cutting phase

drills.name: Mark-centering drill
drills.description: Place the loop at the target mark, pause, and verify alignment before cinching to improve positioning efficiency.
drills.targets_weakness: Spent excessive time on loop positioning without securing the final placement.

drills.name: Tail-cut finish drill
drills.description: Practice 10 secure placements followed by controlled tail cuts without disturbing the loop to improve completion speed.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the tail cut within the time limit.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your solid positioning skills into faster task completion by practicing the transition from loop placement to tail cutting without hesitation.
